contents.description: The pack provides 9 skills and 1 orchestration skills under `rh-virt` for Red Hat platforms.

deploy_and_use:
## Install (Lola)

Add the marketplace and install this module from `marketplace/rh-agentic-collection.yml` (path `rh-virt`). See the pack `README.md` for prerequisites, MCP env vars, and safety notes.
description: Virtual machine management and automation for OpenShift Virtualization and KubeVirt workloads.
name: Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization Agentic Collection

resources.description: Source repository for these packs and skills.
resources.title: agentic-collections repository

sample_workflows.name: Choose the right skill
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "I have a task for this collection"
- Open CLAUDE.md intent routing and match your request to a skill name.
- Invoke that skill and follow its workflow and prerequisites.

summary:
- **Pack:** `rh-virt`
- **Focus:** Virtual machine management and automation for OpenShift Virtualization and KubeVirt workloads.
- **Skills:** see `.catalog/collection.yaml` contents for the authoritative list.
